subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Horizon! Today the firmament of existence is illumined by a resplendent star whose radiance exalteth the Word of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اکبر الیوم افق وجود بکوکبی تابان گردد که انوارش اعلاء کلمه الله
subcodes.subjects: @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
